commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Ho, everyone that thirsts, come you to the waters, and he that has no money; come you, buy, and eat; yea, come, buy wine and milk without money and without price. Waters, which in that country are very scarce. Septuagint, "fat. "(Calmet) In the western Churches, wine and honey were given to the new baptized, chap. Jerome) Christ invites all to come to him, John iv. The establishment of the Church is described under the figure of the return from Babylon. (Calmet) Grace is offered to all. But only those are justified who thirst, and do their best, Matthew v. (Worthington).
